creator: ports@toco-domains.de
text:
Created attachment 167835
patch with update to 0.24.0

Hello,

attached a patch to update devel/libgit2 to its current version 0.24.0.


poudriere build fine for:
9.3 amd + i386
10.1 amd + i386
10.2 amd + i386
11-current r293820 amd + i386

portlint is also fine.

And i did a runtime test. This lib is used by GitLab which works on top of it. :)

Greetings,
Torsten
